snippet.title: 🔴 [HINDI] TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring | Grand Finals - Champion Rush
snippet.description:
12 Teams. One Champion 🏆
Welcome to the TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring GRAND FINALS!
📍 Live from Mahatma Mandir Convention & Exhibition Centre, Gandhinagar
Day 2: First team to 80 points activates Champion Rush! Any team who wins a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will become CHAMPIONS of TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring

Fighting their way through the Group and Knockout Stages, these are 12 teams that have made it to the GRAND FINALS:
- GODS REIGN PROS
- IQOO TOTAL GAMING
- IQOO OGXTSG
- GODLIKE ESPORTS
- AEROBOTZ ESPORTS
- REVENANT XSPARK
- TEAM HIND
- RNX ESPORTS
- RECKONING ESPORTS
- GG INSTINCT
- GYAN GAMING
- FIREEYES GAMING

🗓️ Grand Finals Schedule:
Day 1 - Point Rush 📅 April 25 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards
Day 2 - CHAMPION RUSH 📅 April 26 | 🕑 2:00 PM IST onwards

snippet.title: Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 - Official Trailer | Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli, Abhishek Chauhan, Nidhi Shah, Khushali Kumar, Naveen Kasturia, Vaishak Shankar
Directed by Ambrish Verma
Written by Ambrish Verma
Production Company: The Viral Fever

Official Release Date - May 1, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Two men chase their dreams in different worlds: Prashant battles Mumbai’s ruthless film industry to build his career, while Jimmy, a real estate salesman known as the “Sales God,” will stop at nothing to take revenge on his Mama as both question whether destiny is decided by fate or by those bold enough to take control of it.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Kya Mausum Aaya Hai | Anari Movie Song | Udit Narayan, Sadhana Sargam | Hindi Gana
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song Name : Kya Mausam Aaya Hai
Singer : Sadhana Sargam, Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand Shrivastav, Milind Shrivastav
Lyrics by: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Director:  K. Muralimohana Rao
Star Cast: Karishma Kapoor, Venkatesh, Suresh Oberoi

Lyrics : 
Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Kaaton se ho jaye paon na ghayal
Kaaton pe naachungi bandh ke mein payal
Ghar nahi yeh to
Kutiya humari hai

Yeh teri kutiya to mehalo se pyaari hai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Behti pawan ki
Ujaale gagan ki
Jee karta hai saath chalu

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Dharti pe bekhren hai
Oos ke moti

Yeh teri boli to
Sur naye peeroti

Dard ka woh agan

Mein chod ke aaye
Kya tujhe jaannat ki raunka nahi bhai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai.

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma

Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu

snippet.title: Aksar Is Duniya Mein - HD | Akshay Kumar, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhary | Dhadkan Song, Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Aksar Is Duniya Mein - HD | Akshay Kumar, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhary | Dhadkan Song, Alka Yagnik

Song Credit:-

Title: Aksar Is Duniya Mein
Movie/album: Dhadkan
Singers: Alka Yagnik
Song Lyricists: Sameer
Composer: Nadeem Saifi, Shravan Rathod
Music Director: Nadeem Saifi, Shravan Rathod
Starring: Akshay Kumar, Shilpa Shetty, Sunil Shetty, Mahima Chaudhry
Release on: 11th August, 2000

Song Lyrics:-

Hey hey eh hey hey eh hey eh hey.......
Hey hey eh hey hey aa ha aa ha.........
Aa haa ha ha haaaa

Aksar is duniya mein anjane milte hain
Aksar is duniya mein anjane milte hain
Anjani raahon mein milke kho jaate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Aksar is duniya mein anjaane milte hain
Anjaani raahon mein milke kho jaate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Aksar iss duniya mein...

Aankhon se baat hoti hai,
dhadkan bhi saath hoti hai
Koyi naa samjhe yeh ishk kee zubaan
Aankhon se baat hoti hai,
dhadkan bhei saath hoti hai
Koyi naa samjhe yeh ishk kee zubaan
Du ru ru ru ru ru.........
Dheeray dheeray se woh
dil mein bas jaate hain
Dheeray dheeray se woh
dil mein bas jaate hain
Choree choree se woh dil ko churate hain
Phir ek din woh bichhad jaate hain
Aksar iss duniya me.........

Yeh dil toh pyaar maange hai,
saccha dildar maange hai
Jaanay mohabbat mile kisse kahan
Yeh dil toh pyaar maange hai,
saccha dildar maange hai
Jaanay mohabbat mile kisse kahan
Du ru ru ru ru ru.........
Jab aisi raaton mein deewane milte hain
Jab aisi raaton mein deewane milte hain
Nazrein takraati hain
phir dil dhadakte hain
Chahat ke afsaane ban jaate hain

Aksar iss duniya mein
Anjane milte hain
Anjanee raho me milke kho jate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain
Lekin hamesha woh yaad aate hain

Haan aksar iss duniya mein
Aah aah aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajana💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई सजना Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​
snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

snippet.title: Hentok Konyak - Nyu Wan Wao (Official Music Video) @Aphewangsa
snippet.description:
My First Original Song — A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2


Cast:

•Aphe Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/aphe_cooks_and_vlogs2712?igsh=ams4aXZ5Z2x3M3dh
•Rathai
•Amenla Pongenhttps://www.instagram.com/amen90105?igsh=cmV0bHdjeTE1bW4w


Video Credits:

•Cinematography by Studio LAGOMhttps://www.instagram.com/studiolagom__?igsh=dGV4Y2VnM3o3anZ4
•Directed by Akum Denhttps://www.instagram.com/aakumden?igsh=c3p0ODY0ejVjMTlh
•Viky Meiteihttps://www.instagram.com/vm_videosolution?igsh=MWN6cHJvNW5qdnljdA==
•Manminder Singhhttps://www.instagram.com/manni0.9?igsh=cWV4bTVueno3Z2tl


Script Written by: Chongboi Singsonhttps://www.instagram.com/writes_cb?igsh=aTRwOWQ1eTBqanlw



Lyrics Translated by: Leiwang Thttps://www.instagram.com/_alei_yanlem?igsh=dWZzOXZtczRzY3Fk


Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.


We are also grateful to Mr. & Mrs. Tashi Ozukum for generously providing their home, along with their warm hospitality and invaluable support throughout the production.





LYRICS 

Verse 1
Kahtok nyu me üya tuh shüo 
Hongli mongmei pu yünang pe
Nyem ha me muh khah ha min pha
Puhpu humnung nyu li phei me

Chorus 
Onyu nang e puhpu nang ha tüo 
Nang ngoh pu nyoi te yah tei yah
Nyu wan wao e ü-üyin mükphe shaha
Phei nyih nyu a lin kúm

Verse 2
Shin mang me nge pu te nohoi
Mangmeng üja she ie nang ki
Onyu tüme ame hüo hah
Hüo lak nyoi üte ie tüm pha


Verse 3
Puhpu humnung nyu yünang ma
Noksha phongjong wing e mah nang
Yoi nyu mongmeng ne tah túm hah 
Li phei me yung pu jajang ja

Verse 4
Shaji onyu nang ha tüo a
Nang monghum lak ju ngoi tüki
Nang ha ükem pa yung shon pu
Ngao wing jai ya ken pu onyu..

#mothersday #song #tribute #emotional #song #truestory #hentok #konyak

snippet.description:
🎶 Panna Ki Tamanna Hai | new version | Classic Evergreen Hindi Song | Kishore Kumar & Lata Mangeshkar | 70s Golden Melody 🎶

Experience the timeless magic of Panna Ki Tamanna Hai, one of the most loved romantic classics from the golden era of Hindi music. This evergreen masterpiece from the movie Heera Panna beautifully blends melody, emotion, and nostalgia. Sung by the legendary voices of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar, this song continues to win hearts across generations.

Let yourself enjoy the soothing tune, meaningful lyrics, and unforgettable chemistry of old Bollywood music. Perfect for lovers of retro songs, 70s classics, and evergreen Hindi melodies.

✨ If you love old Hindi songs, don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more golden classics.

In this episode, Franklin rises from the streets and becomes the most powerful mafia boss in Los Santos. From small deals to controlling the entire city, this story is packed with action, strategy, betrayal, and power.

Watch how Franklin builds his empire, dominates enemies, and takes control of everything in Los Santos. This is not just gameplay — this is a full cinematic experience with intense moments and unexpected twists.

snippet.title: Teri Aa’n (Official Video) | Sabba | Black Virus | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents Teri Aa’n ❤️, a Punjabi love story by Sabba that beautifully captures the power of true love.

Set against an emotional love story, Teri Aa’n conveys the idea that no matter the struggles, true love always finds its way and unites hearts. With heartfelt lyrics, soothing melodies, and Sabba’s raw, expressive voice, this love song perfectly connects with anyone who believes in deep, unconditional love.

Whether you're into Punjabi love songs, romantic Punjabi songs, or emotional songs that tell a story, this new song deserves a spot on your playlist. Perfect for late-night listening & long drives. 

👉 If you enjoy Sabba’s new songs like Jawani or Sohna Sohni, don’t miss this one. This latest song carries the same vibe and heartfelt emotion that you’ll definitely fall in love with. ❤️ Tune in now and feel the magic of love that never fades. 

#TeriAan #PunjabiSong #NewSong #BestPunjabiSongs #SabbaNewSong #SabbaPunjabiSongNew

snippet.description:
Singers - Ajay Gogavale & Shreya Ghoshal
Music - Ajay-Atul
Lyricist - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Cast - Ishaan & Janhvi
Production House - Zee Studios & Dharma Productions
Producer - Karan Johar, Zee Studios, Hiroo Yash Johar & Apoorva Mehta
Director - Shashank Khaitan

Welcome to Soulful Shreya Ghoshal Songs, your melodious corner dedicated to the timeless voice of Shreya Ghoshal — one of India’s most celebrated playback singers. ✨🎤
Here, we bring you a heartfelt collection of her biggest hits, romantic melodies, and soul‑touching songs that have captured millions of hearts across the world.

White Hill Music Presents 🔥 MIRZAPUR – Official Video Out Now! 🔥R Nait New Song 

The wait is over! The latest Punjabi song MIRZAPUR by R Nait and Gurlez Akhtar is finally here 💥
Packed with powerful lyrics, desi attitude, and high-energy vibes, this new Punjabi song 2026 is all set to rule your playlist.

If you love R Nait’s style, storytelling, and swag, this punjabi new song hits hard with its raw Punjabi feel and catchy beats 🔥 From bold lyrics to signature vocals, MIRZAPUR is another solid addition to the Punjabi music scene.

🎧 Listen Now & Feel The Vibe

♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : coming soon

-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હો જોન માં હોનાનો નગારો જોન માં રૂપાના નગારો...(૨)
રૂપાશેર દોડી મોણારાજ
હે ઘોડે આજ ચડ્યા છે વીર મારા 
ઊંચા અલબેલા કુંવારા 
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હો પીઠી ભર્યા પીળા રે પીતાંબર 
ઝરી ભર્યા સાફે શોભે વર 
હે ટોડલે બોલે મોર મધરાળા 
લાડો આજ લાગેશે રૂપાળા...(૨)
માડી જાયો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે ઘર નો મોભી પૈઇણે મોણારાજ

હો ગામના ગોદરે નજરો નોખો ટ્રાફિક થયું જોમ 
વરઘોડા નો વટ જોવા આયુ આખુ ગોમ
હો વીરા મારા બંદૂકે ભડાકા ફૂટે જાજેરીશે જોન 
સીતા ના તોરણે જોને પૈણવા હેડ્યા રોમ
હો પૈઇણે લખપતિ નો લાડ વાગે શરણાઈ શુર તાલ...(૨)
હે વરને લીધી વરના ગાડી લેવા જાવુ નોનચક લાડી...(૨)
વેવાઈ વાળા ગોમ મોણારાજ 
હે લાડી વાળા દેશ મોણારાજ

હે કડકડતી નોટો ઊડે ને રૂપિયો નો વરસાદ
અમેરા અવસર માં કુટુંબ પરિવાર નો સાથ
હો હગા વાલા સેન સંબંધી ના મોઢે એકજ વાત
વિવા જોયા ઘણા પણ આ જોન નો જબરો ઠાઠ
હો પીળા પ્રભાત ની પોર જોન આજ જોડી જાકમ જોળ...(૨)
હે વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
ગાડીએ ઓ ઊભાશે વરરાજા 
વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
સનરૂફ ગાડીએ ઊભાશે વરરાજા
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે વીરો મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
-------------------------------

♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : coming soon

-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હો જોન માં હોનાનો નગારો જોન માં રૂપાના નગારો...(૨)
રૂપાશેર દોડી મોણારાજ
હે ઘોડે આજ ચડ્યા છે વીર મારા 
ઊંચા અલબેલા કુંવારા 
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હો પીઠી ભર્યા પીળા રે પીતાંબર 
ઝરી ભર્યા સાફે શોભે વર 
હે ટોડલે બોલે મોર મધરાળા 
લાડો આજ લાગેશે રૂપાળા...(૨)
માડી જાયો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે ઘર નો મોભી પૈઇણે મોણારાજ

હો ગામના ગોદરે નજરો નોખો ટ્રાફિક થયું જોમ 
વરઘોડા નો વટ જોવા આયુ આખુ ગોમ
હો વીરા મારા બંદૂકે ભડાકા ફૂટે જાજેરીશે જોન 
સીતા ના તોરણે જોને પૈણવા હેડ્યા રોમ
હો પૈઇણે લખપતિ નો લાડ વાગે શરણાઈ શુર તાલ...(૨)
હે વરને લીધી વરના ગાડી લેવા જાવુ નોનચક લાડી...(૨)
વેવાઈ વાળા ગોમ મોણારાજ 
હે લાડી વાળા દેશ મોણારાજ

હે કડકડતી નોટો ઊડે ને રૂપિયો નો વરસાદ
અમેરા અવસર માં કુટુંબ પરિવાર નો સાથ
હો હગા વાલા સેન સંબંધી ના મોઢે એકજ વાત
વિવા જોયા ઘણા પણ આ જોન નો જબરો ઠાઠ
હો પીળા પ્રભાત ની પોર જોન આજ જોડી જાકમ જોળ...(૨)
હે વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
ગાડીએ ઓ ઊભાશે વરરાજા 
વાયડ ગોમ ના વડલે વાગે વાજા 
સનરૂફ ગાડીએ ઊભાશે વરરાજા
ભઈલુ મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
હે વીરો મારો પૈઇણે મોણારાજ
-------------------------------

snippet.title: ‘NANG  I  AWM A’ - JONATHAN LIANHNA Ft ZOREMA KHIANGTE & UNCLE JOE
snippet.description:
Kan ṭhian pathuma kan hla pathumna kan ti puitling ve leh thei ta mai hi Pathian hruaina kan dawn nasat zia tichiangtu a ni a, Lalpa chungah hian kan van lawm tak êm..! He hla kaltlang hian Lalpa hming chu chawimawiin awm sela,
Lalpa’n he hla ngaithlatu zawng zawngte malsawm vek che u rawh se.

Audio - Mathana Efx
Video - M_space production
Composer - Jonathan Lianhna
Co-writer(rap verse) - Uncle Joe
2nd voice - Regina

He video puitlin theihna tura tha leh zung min senpuitu zawng zawngte chungah thinlung takin lawmthu kan sawi e.

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ

⚡️ Banjaare:
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

📷 Photo:
https://unsplash.com

🚫 If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

SXYBIT – Closer Tonight (Official Music Video)
Closer Tonight is a heartfelt and emotional music video that reflects connection, closeness, and the feeling of wanting to be near someone special.
This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and intimate late-night atmosphere that beautifully complements the mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, romantic storytelling, and meaningful moments, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTube’s Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

Romantic & late-night storytelling
Clean cinematic visuals

Music-driven visual narrative
Calm, intimate, and heartfelt mood

This visual story is crafted with clean cinematic shots, soft lighting, and smooth transitions, creating a calm and intimate late-night atmosphere that beautifully complements the mood of the music.

The video focuses on gentle emotions, romantic storytelling, and meaningful moments, making it suitable for all audiences and fully compliant with YouTube’s Community Guidelines and monetization policies.

snippet.title: Milo Na Tum To Hum Ghabraye | Lata Mangeshkar | Golden Era Song | YKS Music
snippet.description:
🎶 Song Description (YouTube के लिए)

दिल को छू जाने वाला ये खूबसूरत गाना “मिलो ना तुम तो हम घबराएं” एक गहरी मोहब्बत और तड़प की कहानी बयान करता है। जब प्यार सच्चा होता है, तो दूरियां भी बेचैन कर देती हैं — यही एहसास इस गाने के हर शब्द और हर सुर में झलकता है। ❤️

इस गाने में एक ऐसे दिल की बात कही गई है जो अपने प्यार के बिना अधूरा है। मिलन की चाह, जुदाई का डर और दिल की बेचैनी को बेहद भावुक अंदाज़ में पेश किया गया है।

✨ अगर आपने कभी सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो ये गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा।

🎧 Credits:
Singer: Sonu Raj
Music: Sonu Music
Lyrics Dev Raj

📌 अगर आपको ये गाना पसंद आए तो:
👍 Like करें
💬 Comment करें
🔔 Channel को Subscribe करना न भूलें

#RomanticSong #SadSong #HindiSong #LoveSong #SonuMusic #90sStyle

snippet.title: Rooth Kar Hum (Lyrics) - Gunaah | Roop Kumar Rathod, Sabri Brothers
snippet.description:
#RoothKarHum #Gunaah #RoopKumarRathod

Rooth Kar Hum (Lyrics) - Roop Kumar Rathod, Sabri Brothers | Gunaah

Sung by RoopKumar Rathod and the Sabri Brothers, Rooth Kar Hum is the classic qawwali-esque tribute to estranged lovers.

Song Name - Rooth Kar Hum
Movie - Gunaah
Singer - RoopKumar Rathod and Sabri Brothers
Composer - Sajid Wajid
Lyricists - Anand Bakshi

Lyrics:

Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage
Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage
Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage
Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage
Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage

Woh humein, woh humein...
Woh humein aur bhi yaad aane lage
Woh humein aur bhi yaad aane lage

(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, jaane waale, jaane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)

Humne dil se kahi apni majbooriyan
Humne dil se kahi apni majbooriyan
Humne dil se kahi apni majbooriyan
Humne dil se kahi apni majbooriyan

Dil ko lekin ye saare bahaane lage
Dil ko lekin ye saare bahaane lage

(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)

Unke qadmon mein gir jaayein
Mar jaayein hum
Unke qadmon mein gir jaayein
Mar jaayein hum, mar jaayein hum

Is tarah apni mitti thikane lage
Is tarah apni mitti thikane lage

(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)

Unse ek pal mein kaise bichhad jaayein hum?
Unse ek pal mein kaise bichhad jaayein hum?
Unse ek pal mein kaise bichhad jaayein hum?
Unse ek pal mein kaise bichhad jaayein hum?

Jinse milne mein shayad zamane lage
Jinse milne mein shayad zamane lage

(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale)

Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage
Rooth kar hum unhein bhool jaane lage

Woh humein, woh humein...
Woh humein aur bhi yaad aane lage
Woh humein aur bhi yaad aane lage

(Jaane waale, yaad aane waale)
(Bhool jaane waale, yaad aane waale...)
Jo soch rahe hain, kabhi dekha hi nahi tha
Jo dekh rahe hain, kabhi socha hi nahi tha, nahi tha
Yaad aane waale, yaad aane waale, yaad aane waale

#SabriBrothers #RoothKarHum #Gunaah

snippet.title: శనివారం రోజు గోవింద నామాలు వింటే కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం 🙏 | Govinda Namalu Full With Telugu Lyrics
snippet.description:
శనివారం రోజు గోవింద నామాలు వింటే కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం 🙏 | Govinda Namalu Full With Telugu Lyrics  


Listen to the sacred Govinda Namalu with Telugu lyrics on this special Saturday and receive divine blessings of Lord Sri Venkateswara Swamy. It is believed that chanting or hearing Govinda Namalu brings immense spiritual merit, equivalent to the blessings of countless lifetimes.

These powerful names of Lord Govinda purify the mind, remove negative energies, and attract wealth, happiness, and prosperity into life. Devotees believe that listening with true devotion helps remove obstacles and fulfills wishes.

Make this devotional chanting a part of your Saturday spiritual routine and invite the grace of Tirumala Balaji into your home. May your life be filled with peace, success, and divine blessings 🙏

snippet.title: *OMG* MOST RAREST CAR IN FORZA HORIZON 5!😱 2000+ SUPER WHEEL SPIN OPENING!
snippet.description:
REBUILDING an OLD LAMBORGHINI to FASTEST LAMBO EVER! 🔥 - Forza Horizon 5 | LOGITECH G29

What happens when you take a forgotten, beat-up Lamborghini and transform it into an absolute speed monster? In this Forza Horizon 5 build, we're doing the IMPOSSIBLE! 🚀

Watch as we take a neglected Lamborghini from the junkyard, completely rebuild it, tune every component, and push it beyond its limits to create what might just be the FASTEST Lamborghini ever built in Forza Horizon 5! All played with the Logitech G29 steering wheel for the ultimate sim racing experience


Subscribe to our Other Youtube Channels

Second Gaming Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@Dattraxplays
Vlogging Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@honeyyyy123

snippet.title: Live Satsang पूज्य प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का सत्संग | 26-04-2026 | Sunday
snippet.description:
🔴 LIVE: श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज का आज का सत्संग | भजन, प्रवचन और कीर्तन | 26-04-2026 | Sunday
🌸 आज के पावन सत्संग में आपका हार्दिक स्वागत है! 🌸
श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज के मधुर वचनों, भक्ति-रस भरे भजनों और कीर्तन के साथ आज का दिन बनाएँ दिव्यता और शांति से पूर्ण।
आइए डूब जाएँ श्री राधा-कृष्ण प्रेम रस और वृंदावन धाम की महिमा में।

🕉️ आज के LIVE सत्संग में क्या मिलेगा?

✨ जीवन, धर्म और अध्यात्म से जुड़े प्रश्नों के गूढ़ उत्तर
✨ श्री वृंदावन धाम की महिमा और प्रेम-रस का रहस्य
✨ भजन, कीर्तन और प्रवचन जो मन और आत्मा को शुद्ध करें
✨ आध्यात्मिक मार्गदर्शन और सरल जीवन का संदेश
✨ शांति और आनंद पाने का सच्चा मार्ग

📅 कार्यक्रम विवरण
26-04-2026 | Sunday
स्थान: श्री वृंदावन धाम (LIVE)

🌼 इस सत्संग से लाभ

✅ भक्ति मार्ग की गहराई समझ पाएंगे
✅ मानसिक शांति और आत्मिक संतुलन प्राप्त होगा
✅ श्री राधा-कृष्ण के प्रति प्रगाढ़ प्रेम उत्पन्न होगा
✅ जीवन को सकारात्मक और सार्थक बनाने की प्रेरणा मिलेगी

🔔 जुड़े रहने के लिए

👉 चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें और बेल आइकन दबाएँ
👉 रोज़ सुनें भक्ति-रस भरे भजन, प्रवचन और सत्संग
👉 अपने परिवार और मित्रों के साथ यह LIVE साझा करें

🌸 SEO Keywords

#LiveSatsang #PremanandJiMaharaj #VrindavanLive #BhajanKirtan #Pravachan #RadhaKrishnaBhakti #PremRas #VrindavanSatsang #SanatanDharma #BhaktiMarg #HinduismLive #MaharajJiDarshan #SpiritualWisdom #PathToPeace

🚩 इस दिव्य अवसर को न चूकें!
🙏 अभी LIVE जुड़ें और श्री प्रेमानंद जी महाराज के साथ अपनी आध्यात्मिक यात्रा को ऊँचाइयों तक ले जाएँ।

snippet.description:
Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/938009592419228/

►Song - Marab Chhatiye Me Goli
►Singer - Jitendra Singh Anshu, Khushi Kakkar
►Lyrics - Prince Priyadarshi
►Music Director - Priyanshu Singh
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 45604

♪ Spotify :
♪ Gaana : 
♪ Jio Saavn : 
♪ Apple Music : 
♪ Amazon Prime Music : 
♪ YouTube Music :   https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=F8Y9XXbhYUo&si=-X8IpURFnx4lPvaa
♪ Instagram Reels :  https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/938009592419228/
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu?si=eed3103487f24692

Connected with us !

👉 Follow us on Instagram :- https://www.instagram.com/wavemusic/
👉 Like us on Facebook :- https://www.facebook.com/WaveMusicIndiaofficial
👉Join Us on Whtsapp :- https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacuoR1GpLHNjsDWYd2R
👉 Follow us on X ( Twitter ) :- https://x.com/WaveMusicWM?t=kKhpZOhFiLqswaThplIGBg&s=08 

Lyrics - 
M - शक करेलु खाली, बुझे लू जान जाली
फ़ोन तू चेक करेलु , काहे के हाली-हाली सुनो!

F - त कईल सारा गुंडा गर्दी भुला जइबा..
केहू ओ के फेरा में जे आ जइबा..
मारब छातीये में गोली छितरा जइबा
मारब पिस्टल से गोली छितरा जइबा

F - हमके बता दS कवन हिया गद्दारीन
हम्हु ना कम हई हई रंगदारीन
उड़ा देब, बुझलS!

M - बोल के न पति के डालS डिप्रेशन में
शक कइल ठीक नईखे जान हो रिलेशन में
कुल बुझतानी हम... का?

F - कहियो जे छाछ प धरा जइबा...
कहियो जे छाछ प धरा जइबा
मारब छातीये में गोली छितरा जइबा
मारब पिस्टल से गोली छितरा जइबा 

F - प्रिंस प्रियांशु बाड़S मन के मालिक 
अंशु फँसावेला माल नबालिक
झूठ बात बा, सारा खबर रहत बा... सुनो!

M  जैसे दूर रहे न मोबाइल से कवर
ओईसे हम बानी ऑर्केस्टा के लवर
एक गो बात सुन लS... सुनावS!

F - नचनिया के नाच में धरा जइबा...
नचनिया के नाच में धरा जइबा..
मारब छातीये में गोली छितरा जइबा
मारब पिस्टल से गोली छितरा जइबा

snippet.title: TAJ - The Singh | Official Video | New Hindi Song 2026 | Rap Song Hindi | Sad Songs Hindi | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Voila Digi Private Limited presents TAJ, by The Singh. This is a beautiful sad song about two lovers being separated because of the world. 

TAJ is also available on all audio platforms:
Spotify: https://tinyurl.com/4p8h822r

Credits:
Singer / Composer / Lyricist: The Singh
Music Producer: ABS
Special Thanks: Karishma Chhajer
Video by: Sunix Thakor
Producers: Girish Jain & Vinit Jain

Lyrics:
Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Mita do kahaniya jo Taj pe likhi hai
Shah Jahan Mumtaz pe likhi hai
Meri kahani mere khaas ne likhi hai
Heer Ranjha chhodo, mere aaj pe likhi hai

Rago me rang kya khun ka alag hai
Roop Rang Jaati Karam bhi alag hai
Ab bolte ho duniya kya kahegi
Iss hisaab se toh jaana mera dharam bhi alag hai

Na bewafa hai woh, na mai bewafa hu
Muqaddar me rehna likha hi nahi hai
Keh do kaise bolu mai usse bewafa
Uska manpasand toh uska joda bhi nahi hai

Kaun jaane kitna dard saath me sahegi
Kisi gair mard saath saari umar woh rahegi
Ishq haar jaata har janam mein apno ke hi aage
Ab yeh na socho aake tumse duniya kya kahegi

Chalo muskurake aakhri vida do
Dil se mera jaana naam bhi hata do
Koi puche tumse kisne ki daga
Toh naam lena mera 
Usko mujkho bewafa bata do

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Maine itna pyaara dhokebaaz nahi dekha
Beshaq ishq ki nishaani hai Taj
Magar kabhi Mumtaz ne Taj Nahi dekha

Lyrics:
"Her doli mera janaza saja do"
What is my account? Someone please tell me what my account is
Kyu dil se Loving someone has become a sin.
If it is a sin, then someone should tear down the Taj.

Arrange his palanquin for my funeral.
What does someone owe me? Please tell me.
Why has loving someone from the heart become a sin?
If it is a sin, then someone should tear down the Taj.

Erase the stories written on the Taj.
It is written on Shah Jahan Mumtaz.
My story has been written by my special one.
Leave the Ranjha, it is written on my today.

Is the color of blood different from the colors?
The form, color, caste, and deeds are also different.
Now you are saying what will the world say.
By this measure, you should know that even my religion is different. Yes

Neither is he unfaithful, nor am I.
It's not written in my will to live with him.
Tell me, how can I say I'm unfaithful to him?
He doesn't even have a partner, even if he likes me.

Who knows how much pain she'll endure with me.
She'll live with a stranger all her life.
Love loses in every life, even before its own.
Now don't think about what the world will say to you.

Let's say a final goodbye with a smile.
Remove my name from your heart.
If someone asks who betrayed you,
then take my name.
Call him unfaithful to me.

Her palanquin is my funeral procession. Two
What does someone owe me? Please tell me.
Why has loving someone from the heart become a sin?
If it's a sin, then someone should tear down the Taj.

Decorate his palanquin for my funeral.
What does someone owe me? Please tell me.
Why has loving someone from the heart become a sin?
If it's a sin, then someone should tear down the Taj.

Whose love is there even when he cheats.
Whose love is there even when he cheats.
I've never seen such a loving cheater.
Of course, the Taj is the symbol of love.
But Mumtaz never saw the Taj.

snippet.title: இளையராஜாவின் பொற்கால பாடல்கள் | S. Janaki Songs | Kovil Mani Osai | Aazhakadalil Thediya
snippet.description:
இளையராஜாவின் இசையில் 1978 முதல் 1981 வரையிலான காலத்தின் பொற்கால பாடல்கள் இதோ. மகிழ்ச்சி, காதல், சோகம் மற்றும் கொண்டாட்டம் கலந்த இந்த தொகுப்பு உங்கள் மனதை வருடும். எஸ்பிபி, ஜானகி, மலேசியா வாசுதேவன் போன்ற ஜாம்பவான்களின் குரலில் இந்த இனிய பாடல்களை கேட்டு மகிழுங்கள். உங்கள் விருப்பமான பாடலை கமெண்டில் பகிருங்கள், மறக்காமல் சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள். Let the magic of music live on…

00:00:05 Kovil Mani Osai 
00:04:48 Aazhakadalil Thediya 
00:09:09 Madai Thiranthu 
00:13:30 Andhi Mazhai Pozhikaruthu 
00:18:05 Aaha Vandhirichchu 
00:22:14 Mayile Mayile 
00:26:38 Kathal Ennum Kovil 
00:31:12 Ellorum Porandhome 
00:35:31 Dhinam Dhinam Oru 
00:38:41 Angel I See Only You

Album: Kizhakke Pogum Rail
Artist: Malaysia Vasudevan, S. Janaki

Lyricist: Kannadasan

Album: Kavalaiillatha Manithan

Music Director: Ilaiyaraaja
Lyricist: Panchu Arunachalam 


Lyrics :

Madai Thiranthu Thaavum Nathi Alai Naan
Manam Thiranthu Koovum Siru Kuyil Nan
Isai Kalaignan En Asaigal Ayiram Ninaithathu Palithathu Hei..
Kalam Kaninthathu Kathavugal Thiranthathu
Gnanam Vilainthathu Nallisai Piranthathu
Puthu Ragam Padaipathale Nanum Iraivane
Viralalim Kuralilum Swarangalin Nattiyam Amaippen Nan..
Madai Thiranthu Thaavum Nathi Alai Naan
Manam Thiranthu Koovum Siru Kuyil Nan
Isai Kalaignan En Asaigal Ayiram Ninaithathu Palithathu Hei..
Netrin Arangile Nizhalgalin Nadagam
Indrin Ethirile Nijangalin Dharisanam
Varungalam Vasantha Kaalam Naalum Mangalam
Isaikkena Isaigindra Rasigargal Rajiyam Enakke Dhan..
Madai Thiranthu Thaavum Nathi Alai Naan
Manam Thiranthu Koovum Siru Kuyil Nan
Isai Kalaignan En Asaigal Ayiram Ninaithathu Palithathu Hei

snippet.title: Vellichudare - Lyrical | Irandu Vaanam | Vishnu Vishal | Mamitha Baiju | Dhibu Ninan Thomas
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Tamil

Presenting the first single 'Vellichudare' from "Irandu Vaanam" A foot tapping love song that you will love. Starring Vishnu Vishal, Mamitha Baiju and others. Directed by Ramkumar. Music Composed by Dhibu Ninan Thomas

Song Credits: 
Song - Vellichudare
Music - Dhibu Ninan Thomas
Lyrics - Madrashe
Singer - Kapil Kapilan 

Musicians & Technicians Credits :
Guitars : Sandeep Mohan
Bass Guitar : Naveen Napier
Nadaswaram : Nadasbala D Balasubramani
Kanjira & Percussions : Sruthiraj
Tavil & Tapes : Ganapathi , Sruthiraj , Venkat , Kiran
Backing Vocals , Electric Piano and Keys : Dhibu Ninan Thomas
Audio Editors : Maniratnam , Akshay Pradeepan 
Record Engineers :  Amal Mithu  , Amal Raj , Maniratnam
Mix Engineer : Kiran Lal
Master Engineer : Shadab Rayeen
Music Studios : DNT Records  , Mystic Room , 2BarQ   , M Lounge Studios , NHQ Tesseract , New Edge Studios
DNT Records In-House Team :
Studio Incharge : Akshay Pradeepan  
Additional Keys : Joel Mathew 
Session Assistant : Sourav Suresh
Music Advisor : Kapil Kapilan 
Session supervisor : Charu Hariharan 
Music Coordinator : Velavan B
Manager (DNT) : Navaneedhan Shivashanmuga Vadivel

A film by Ramkumar. 
Starring Vishnu Vishal and Mamitha Baiju. 

Director of Photography : Dinesh K Babu
Editor : San Lokesh
Art Director : A. Gopi Anand
Stunt : Vicky
Costume Designer : A. Keerthivasan
Choreography : Leelavathi
Production Controller : Raj Kumar (Rocky)
Production Executive : Govindaraj, Aranthai Bala
Makeup : Raja B
Stills : E. Rajendran
SJF Team : SP Palaniappan
VFX : R. Hariharasuthan (Lorven Studios)
Sound Design : Sync Cinema
Mixing : Aravind Menon
DI : Prasad Studios
Colourist : Ranga
PRO : Suresh Chandra
Marketing and Promotions : The Mug
Publicity Design : Thandora & Vinci Raj
Direction Team : Parthiban Sattanathan | Goutham | GE Ashokkumar | Kathir D | MN Surenthar
Co-Produced by : G. Saravanan & Sai Siddharth
Produced by : Sendhil Thyagarajan | Arjun Thyagarajan
Presented by : TG Thyagarajan 

Directed by : Ramkumar
A Sathya Jyothi Films Production

Lyrics: 
Vellichudare 
En maane  
Thennanthulire 
Thaene 
Kanne en kannamma 
Oh... 
Kanneer yen sollammaa? 
Vannakiliye 
Vaane 
Thangamayile 
Poove 
Ponne en ponnammaa 
Oh… 
Ellaam neethaanamma 
Kurunagaiye 
Podhum... 
Kurai irundhaa 
Theerndhe pogum  
Oru variye 
Podhum  
Kavidhaigalum 
Thorthe pogum. 
En moochaagiye 
En usurerura 
Piricchunai 
Paakkavum  
mudiyaadhu 
... 
Yemmaadi  
Nenjukkulla 
Immaamperiya 
Baaramaa? 
Kondaa en kitta 
Kotti theerthu 
Paarammaa 
Nam Vaanam  
rendaagalaam 
Kaalam 
Rendu thundaagalaam 
Onnaaga naam irundhaa 
Thunbam yedhammaa? 
*** 
Ennodu vaaraayo poove 
Ennulagam nee kaana yengudhammaa 
Anbe podhum 
Kaayam ellaam aari pogum 
Nee paadi aadaayo maane 
Mellidhayam kondaadi meelumamma 
Enge enge 
nee pogiraai 
Ange ange 
naan kannammaa 
Uyire Uyire  
unai thedi naan 
kaalam thaandi 
vandhenamma 
En moochaagiye 
En usurerura 
Piricchunai 
Paakkavum  
mudiyaadhu 
Vellichudare 


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

 
To buy Carvaan, visit https://www.saregama.com/carvaan/tamil
To buy virus free original tracks, visit  https://www.saregama.com/musicstore
Follow us on: YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@SaregamaTamil
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamatamil
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth

#IranduVaanam #DhibuNinanThomas #KapilKapilan #MamithaBaiju #VishnuVishal #SaregamaTamil

snippet.title: I Am Dynamite 🔥 | Official Music Video - DianaMYT Ft. Chandan Shetty | Vijeth Krishna
snippet.description:
This is not just a music video. This is an ignition 🔥

“I Am Dynamite” introduces a new force to the global pop scene — Diana-MYT. A voice that blends attitude, fire, and international sound, stepping out from Mysore to the world stage with fearless energy.

Powered by the vision of @ChandanShettykannada , this project is more than a debut — it’s the beginning of a movement. A new pop identity. A new sound from India is ready to go global.

Every frame, every beat, every word is designed to spark something bigger.

If you’re watching this now… you’re witnessing the birth of a new popstar.

Turn it up. Feel the energy.  
This is Diana-MYT.  
This is Dynamite. 🔥

DianaMYT Ft. Chandan Shetty
Produced By: CS Records 
Directed By: Dilpreetvfx X Rupan Bal 
VFX Supervisor / VFX director: Dilpreetvfx 
Edit / Di Colourist: Dilpreetvfx 
Assistant Director: Harsh Nahar 
Dop: Rahul Sabharwal 
Line Producer: Harsh Nahar 
Music - Lyrics - Mix Master: Vijeth Krishna 
Concept: Chandan Shetty 
Costume Designer: Bharath Sagar
Make-up and Hairstyle: Queenandro, Robin 
2nd Makeup: Mamta Makeover
CGI: Elnorth Studio (Team: Matt Gorski, Derek Mckay, Allen weichman, Sam)
3D Generalist/Co-Ordinator: Savi Kohard
Keying & Roto: Gaganvfx
Jimmy Jib: Munish 
Steady cam: Sandeep
Digital Promotions: Digital Magnet Media - Dhanu Krishnaa

-------------------------------------------------

Follow Me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chandanshettyofficial/
Follow DianaMYT on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/itsdiana_myt/

Subscribe Now: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCwmWD8bYWZ53SWavYj1kdRA

© Chandan Shetty
